LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT (SET FOR HEARING ON MAR-07-2013) OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. FAC SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES ALL ELEMENTS OF IIED IN THE CONTEXT OF LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP. SEE PARAGRAPH 9, 10, 11, 12, 15, 16. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY REPEATEDLY FAILS TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B AND C. SEE CUD-13-644454; CUD-12-643746. NO COURTESY COPIES OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND REPLY WERE PROVIDED TO DEPARTMENT 501 AND/OR 302. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alex Merchant, Esq. (415-504-2165) for Christopher Butler, plaintiff and opposing party / No appearance by defendant and moving party

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED. FAC sufficiently alleges all elements of IIED in the context of landlord-tenant relationship. See paragraph 9, 10, 11, 12, 15, 16. Counsel for the moving party repeatedly fails to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C. See CUD-13-644454; CUD-12-643746. No courtesy copies of the First Amended Complaint and Reply were provided to Department 501 and/or 302. Order is signed in open court. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
